mapper.update: update base_organization_function set state = #{bean.state}, default_account_org_id=#{bean.accountOrgId}, default_settlement_org_id=#{bean.settleOrgId}, modified_by = #{bean.modifiedBy}, modified_name = #{bean.modifiedName}, modified_date=#{bean.modifiedDate} where org_id = #{bean.orgId} and function_type=#{bean.funcType}
mapper.sql: function_type, state, org_id, default_account_org_id, default_settlement_org_id, created_by, created_name, created_date
